Tile Calculator (Square Feet)

Calculate how many tiles you need for your project. Enter room dimensions and tile size to get the total tiles required including waste allowance.

FAQ

How do I calculate tiles needed?

Divide the total area (sq ft) by the area of one tile (sq ft). Add 10-15% for cuts and waste.

How much extra tile should I buy?

Buy 10% extra for simple layouts, 15% for diagonal patterns, and 20% for complex patterns or rooms with many cuts.

How do I calculate square footage?

Multiply length × width in feet. For irregular rooms, divide into rectangles, calculate each, and add them together.
